prompt:
Session 004 - Cinematic Performance
Asset ID: 028
Filename: 028_acceptance.png
Purpose: Peace after struggle. Not happiness. Acceptance. Quiet strength. Hope.
Success Criteria: Chloe appears settled after difficulty, with peace and strength held together.
Generation Guidance: 85mm portrait lens, eye level, chest-up framing, neutral dark background, soft cinematic lighting, natural skin and freckles, same dark wavy hair. The moment feels like an emotional exhale rather than a smile.
Review Focus: Reject if acceptance becomes bland neutrality, happiness, glamour serenity, spiritual cliche, or identity drift.
Locked references: Identity Core v1, Character Turnaround v1, Performance Core v1, Chloe Model v1.
Primary rule: Preserve Chloe exactly; only cinematic emotional state may change.
negative_prompt: Avoid theatrical acting, facial identity drift, artificial skin, changed hair, beauty-model posing, fashion styling, dramatic makeup, exaggerated emotion, childlike appearance, text, watermark.
notes: Canonical acceptance reference. Peace after struggle with quiet strength and hope.
approval_directive: Session 004 partial approval. Asset promoted to canonical cinematic performance reference.
